name: cellfence-workspace
description: Manifest-driven repository governance for parallel coding agents.

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/schema packages/plugin-api packages/adapter-call-pattern packages/adapter-opentelemetry packages/plugin-agent-budget packages/plugin-blast-radius packages/plugin-dependency-sovereignty packages/plugin-geo-purity packages/plugin-legacy-strangler packages/plugin-quants-trend packages/reporter-economy-matrix packages/engine packages/mcp-proxy packages/cli packages/github-action packages/trace
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/schema packages/plugin-api packages/adapter-call-pattern packages/adapter-opentelemetry packages/plugin-agent-budget packages/plugin-blast-radius packages/plugin-dependency-sovereignty packages/plugin-geo-purity packages/plugin-legacy-strangler packages/plugin-quants-trend packages/reporter-economy-matrix packages/engine packages/mcp-proxy packages/cli packages/github-action packages/trace --pretty false
scripts.coverage: npm run build && c8 --reporter=text --reporter=json --reporter=json-summary --reports-dir coverage node --test tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.coverage:100: npm run build && c8 --check-coverage --lines 100 --statements 100 --branches 100 --functions 100 --reporter=text --reporter=json --reporter=json-summary --reports-dir coverage node --test tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.mutation: npm run build && stryker run stryker.conf.mjs
scripts.mutation:dry: npm run build && stryker run stryker.conf.mjs --dryRunOnly
scripts.cellfence:self-check: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js baseline check --manifest cellfence.manifest.json --baseline cellfence.baseline.json
